rationale: Review 1's placement critique and suggested split (plus unrelated PR-desc claim) are not grounded in the diff or roadmap-aligned intent shown in the file's own docstring+section structure, so acting on it forces needless major restructuring. Review 2's sole namespace nit (antipode_convMul_id) is real but a trivial internal-detail/style issue that no maintainer would require; both resulting PRs end up essentially the same quality.
